description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named HLWM CI that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests, excluding paths .mergify.yml and share/*. The workflow should have three ubuntu-latest jobs: build-test-current to build and test on a current ubuntu with a hlwm/ci:focal container, build-clang to build with Clang and run linters and static analyzers, and build-old-32bit to build for 32bit with ancient GCC on Ubuntu 14.04.
